name: Metal Spirit
desc: A spirit made of metal, formed of hard ridges and solid structures.

name: Wood Spirit
desc: A spirit made of wood and plants, formed of organic patterns and growth.

name: Flame Spirit
desc: A spirit made of flickering flames, as fleeting as they are dangerous.

name: Water Spirit
desc: A spirit made of ever-flowing water, constantly changing in shape.

name: Earth Spirit
desc: A spirit made of stone and soil, resilient and sturdy.

name: Wind Spirit
desc: A spirit made of swirling currents of air, ephemeral and beautiful.
